sys_script_fix.description: 2.7 - Task Form Preferences This function updates all visbility settings for all UI Actions on the Task table. In order to support customers creating configurable forms, the standard UI Actions need to be on the form by default. As a result, we need to change all UI Action visibility settings for the standard forms and the Modal forms
sys_script_fix.name: Tasker 2.7-UI Action-Visibility Settings
